{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032112371396002CF720286ED32A96\"}"},"total":22043},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263813507669345039","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容确实精彩，美中不足的是吵架的情节比打架的多，玩命的事不要搞得跟玩儿似的。我追了三年多了，更新多点吧，不行就就赶紧收尾，咱们也算有始有终。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691238445,"group_id":"6488865771232431118","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxHvCP3vb6DB3mq6QREBS0Y=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4e41e7da1f640c19308ace9fb2efccb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776615235\u0026x-signature=9QFn5U%2BSCavKDOSe3xodmZBlkXc%3D","user_id":"106728110018","user_name":"敬亭山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106728110018","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1694743351,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6488865771232431118","book_info":{"abstract":"国之重器，猛虎出笼！亦正亦邪的他注定有着无法平淡的命运！身负枷锁执掌生杀命轮！他身立潮头一生高唱大风！他一生辉煌，彪悍铸就，舞练长空！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/92ea4875ce2f62e30f3edf09c9555bf6","author":"大红大紫","author_id":"","book_id":"6488865771232431118","book_name":"都市之最强狂兵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creatio ent":{"comment_id":"6900185069961789455","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看过的都市类的书这是最好看的一部。 看到后面只想说老黄是帮陈六合，老黄知道了陈六合的身世背景，他救陈六合，让他自己成为陈六合手中的一张最有用的最强的的底牌。老黄自己一味待在缜云帮不到陈六合手中筹码不足，现在在赚筹码为了在之后帮陈六合，现在只是在演戏。（老黄在下很大一步棋，棋的结果是帮陈六合）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1606574536,"group_id":"6488865771232431118","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2k9R6vhKGFUTkkpxuhth2gZ6A+WcthYbbvWj5+R6dvu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4397663732902605","user_name":"闻名遐迩的猪猪侠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4397663732902605","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6488865771232431118","book_info":{"abstract":"国之重器，猛虎出笼！亦正亦邪的他注定有着无法平淡的命运！身负枷锁执掌生杀命轮！他身立潮头一生高唱大风！他一生辉煌，彪悍铸就，舞练长空！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/92ea4875ce2f62e30f3edf09c9555bf6","author":"大红大紫","author_id":"","book_id":"6488865771232431118","book_name":"都市之最强狂兵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":845,\"name\":\"高手下山\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=845\u0026name=高手下山\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":518,\"name\":\"特工\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518\u0026name=特工\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gende
